ApoloAuth.title: ApoloAuth
ApoloAuth.x-description: Use Apolo platform's built-in authentication and authorization. Requires authenticated user credentials with appropriate permissions.

path.title: Path
path.x-description: Provide the Apolo Storage path starting with `storage:` to locate your files.

ApoloFilesPath.title: ApoloFilesPath
ApoloFilesPath.x-description: Specify the path within the Apolo Files application to read from or write to.

name.title: Name
name.x-description: Name of the authentication middleware (with namespace) to apply to ingress traffic.

AuthIngressMiddleware.title: AuthIngressMiddleware
AuthIngressMiddleware.x-description: Configure authentication middleware for ingress traffic.

ingress_http.x-description: Configure HTTP ingress and authentication settings.

BasicNetworkingConfig.title: BasicNetworkingConfig
BasicNetworkingConfig.x-description: Configure network access and authentication settings.

CustomAuth.title: CustomAuth
CustomAuth.x-description: Use a custom authentication middleware for this ingress. Allows integration with custom authentication providers.

auth.title: Auth
auth.x-description: Configure authentication for this ingress. Choose Apolo platform authentication, custom middleware, or no authentication.

IngressHttp.title: IngressHttp
IngressHttp.x-description: Enable access to your application over the internet using HTTPS.

NoAuth.title: NoAuth
NoAuth.x-description: Disable authentication for this ingress. The application will be publicly accessible without any authentication.

Preset.title: Preset
Preset.x-description: Select the resource preset used per service replica.

preset.x-description: Select the resource preset used for the Valkey instance. Minimal resources: 0.1 CPU cores, 128 MiB memory.

ValkeyConfig.title: ValkeyConfig
ValkeyConfig.x-description: Top-level Valkey configuration. Configure the main application preset and deployment architecture (standalone or replication). When using replication, set replica presets and persistence options. These settings are used to generate the Helm values for deploying Valkey.

replica_preset.x-description: Select the resource preset used for Valkey replica instances.

ValkeyReplicationArchitecture.title: ValkeyReplicationArchitecture
ValkeyReplicationArchitecture.x-description:
This mode will deploy a Valkey
                    primary StatefulSet and a Valkey replicas StatefulSet.
                    The replicas will be read-replicas of the primary and
                    two services will be exposed

ValkeyStandaloneArchitecture.title: ValkeyStandaloneArchitecture
ValkeyStandaloneArchitecture.x-description:
This mode will deploy a standalone
                    Valkey StatefulSet. A single service will be exposed

storage_mount.x-description: Select a platform storage path to mount for the Valkey data directory. This is required to persist critical data.

ValkeyVolume.title: ValkeyVolume
ValkeyVolume.x-description: Configure persistent storage for the Valkey data directory. This volume stores encryption keys, instance logs, and source control assets. Persistence is recommended for production deployments.

networking.x-description: Configure network access, HTTP authentication, and related connectivity options.
